items.title: Melania Trump's speech propels Epstein crisis back to forefront
items.dek: She has now placed herself squarely into the Epstein story and at odds with the administration, which wants to end the investigation.
items.body: She has now placed herself squarely into the Epstein story and at odds with the administration, which wants to end the investigation.

items.title: Gunmen kill at least four people at Afghanistan picnic spot
items.dek: Officials say attackers opened fire near the village of Deh Mehri in Herat.
items.body: Officials say attackers opened fire near the village of Deh Mehri in Herat.

items.title: Free agency grades: Sizing up the Eagles' Dontayvion Wicks trade and more
